commit.message:
fix: stable tank colors + client-side prediction + interpolation

- Fix color bug: assign stable colorIndex per player at game_start
  instead of using dynamic array index (which shifted when cloaked
  players were filtered out of snapshots)
- Client-side prediction: own tank moves instantly on input, no
  wait for server round-trip; reconciles with server if drift > 64px
- Linear interpolation for remote players between server ticks,
  eliminating 20Hz stutter
- Server: cache buildScores() result, only rebuild on kill event
- Server: round position values to 1dp to reduce JSON payload size

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch email sender from Resend to Gmail SMTP via nodemailer

Replaces the Resend dependency with nodemailer using Gmail SMTP.
Reads GMAIL_USER and GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD from environment variables.
From address is set to the Gmail account dynamically.

commit.message:
Add Streamable HTTP transport for remote MCP servers

Implements Net::Async::MCP::Transport::HTTP following the MCP 2025-11-25
Streamable HTTP specification. Supports JSON and SSE responses, automatic
session management via Mcp-Session-Id header, and session cleanup via
HTTP DELETE.

Also improves .gitignore with proper patterns for build artifacts, coverage
data, Carton, and editor backups.

commit.message:
feat: Improve error handling and add comprehensive API documentation

## Error Handling Improvements

**ChatInterface.tsx:**
- Add specific error type detection (network, timeout, rate_limit, server, unknown)
- Display contextual error messages with appropriate icons
- Implement retry logic based on error type
- Add 35s timeout on client (greater than server 30s limit)
- Clear error state on new requests and reset
- Add structured error logging for debugging

Error Types:
- 🕐 Timeout: Request exceeded time limit
- 🚫 Rate Limit: Too many requests (429)
- 🔄 Network: Connection failure
- ⚠️ Server: 5xx errors
- ❓ Unknown: Generic errors

## API Documentation

**API_DOCUMENTATION.md (635 lines):**

Comprehensive API documentation covering:
1. **Public Endpoints**
   - POST /api/chat - Main chat interface with RAG
   - GET /api/metrics/stats - Aggregated statistics
   - GET /api/metrics/dashboard - Dashboard data
   - GET /api/metrics/sessions - Chat sessions

2. **Request/Response Formats**
   - JSON schemas for all endpoints
   - Streaming response format (SSE)
   - Error response structure

3. **Usage Examples**
   - cURL examples for all endpoints
   - TypeScript/JavaScript code samples
   - Error handling patterns
   - Retry logic with exponential backoff

4. **Limitations & Restrictions**
   - Rate limiting: 20 req/min per IP
   - Payload limits: 50 messages, 10.000 chars
   - Timeouts: 30s server, 35s client
   - Cost estimates per request

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix 13 bugs causing frozen bot (0 trades, 0% win rate)

Root causes: Kelly criterion returned 0 (no trades possible), reward
signal invisible after tanh squashing, network too small for 623-dim
obs space, penalties dwarfed any positive trading signal.

Reward system:
- Remove tanh squashing, use linear clip [-10, 10]
- Reduce invalid action penalty 0.5 → 0.05
- Reduce losing hold exponent 1.5 → 1.2, cap -5 → -2
- Add open_bonus (+0.3) to incentivize entering trades
- Raise turnover threshold 0.3 → 1.5 (Gold uses ~100% capital)
- Gradual drawdown penalty instead of -5.0 cliff at 15%
- Fix self.stop_loss_percentage → STOP_LOSS_PERCENTAGE

Trade execution:
- Fix Kelly R:R ratio 1.0 → TP/SL (2.0) so Kelly > 0
- Add Kelly minimum floor 0.02 in risk_manager
- Fix estimated cost to include multiplicative spread + commission

Training:
- Add policy_kwargs [512, 256] Tanh (was default [64,64])
- Increase steps 1.5M → 3M, n_steps 2048, batch 256, lr 2e-4
- Add checkpoint version guard to prevent resuming broken model

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Build: dashboard, features, challenges, proposal, cover letter

SLA-16: Populate SP0 internal BPMN with Steps 1-5 user tasks and DMN routing (#55)

SP0 Mini RFP Pre-Screen internal flow (10 elements):
- Step 1: Understand the Need (user task, business-lane, rfp-step1-understand-need)
- Step 2: Vendor Context (user task, business-lane, rfp-step2-vendor-context)
- Step 2.5: Classification Check (user task, governance-lane, rfp-step2b-classification-validation)
- Deal-Killer Pre-Screen (business rule task, OB-DMN-7)
- GW_DealKillerPass gateway (Yes → continue, No → End_DealKiller)
- Step 3: Deal-Killer Results (user task, business-lane, rfp-step3-deal-killer)
- Question Selection (business rule task, OB-DMN-8)
- Step 4: Question Preview (user task, business-lane, rfp-step4-preview)
- Step 5: Send to Vendor (user task, business-lane, rfp-step5-send-vendor)
- Two end events: Pre-Screen Complete + Deal Killer Triggered

Also fixes 3 HIGH + 3 MEDIUM PRD findings from PR #50 review:
- H1: budgetRange enum "500k+" → "over_500k" (matches OB-DMN-9)
- H2: Category 4 trigger: dataClassification → dataTypes (matches DMN R7)
- H3: Category 9 trigger: criticality/critical → businessCriticality/mission-critical
- M1: Section 11.1 form count 9 → 10
- M2: Question count 159 → 167
- M3: Default weights: "equal" → actual category percentages

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
tune: strip to minimal walk-toward-goal reward set

Remove 4 inactive rewards (all were 0 because robot never reaches goal):
  position_tracking, heading_tracking, standing_at_goal, moving_to_goal

Active reward set (7 signals):
  + position_approach 1.5  — distance gradient (sigma=0.5)
  + vel_toward_goal   1.0  — cos-based direction signal
  + lin_vel_tracking  1.5  — velocity magnitude toward goal
  + upright_bonus     0.1  — stay upright
  + base_height       0.3  — prevent crawling
  + feet_air_time     1.0  — stepping gait
  - early_termination -10  — fear falling
  - action_smoothness -0.05
  - joint_pos_limits  -1.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Use persistent signing keychain + delete local stale certs

Fixes multi-runner code signing race conditions:
- Single persistent keychain at ~/ios-signing.keychain-db (shared across runners)
- Never set default-keychain (avoids user-wide race)
- Delete stale dev certs from local keychains after API revocation
- All signing operations inside filesystem lock

commit.message:
Update xemu analysis with Session 31 discoveries (menu states, crash physics)

Key findings:
- B8=5 for BOTH menus and regular racing (not just menus)
- B8=4 only for crash junctions, B8=7 for loading transitions
- Tuning table at 0x40F800 is global, not per-vehicle
- Track env IS loaded at Xbox physical RAM (0xA837C000)
- Camera ptr 0x4D45D0 = gameplay, 0x4D4008 = menus
- Crash physics parts spread to 3000+ units during collisions
- Physics buffer at 0x4DB000 has 0x20-byte stride entries
- Race timer 0x40FB20 only works in crash mode, not regular races

feat: Inventory-Neutral MM strategy with Exchange trait abstraction

Major refactoring to support multi-exchange strategies:

Architecture:
- Add Exchange trait abstraction (src/exchange.rs) for exchange-agnostic strategies
- Implement Exchange trait for LighterTrading
- Externalize all strategy configs to config.toml (removed 12 hardcoded constants)

Strategy:
- New InventoryNeutralMM strategy (Tier-1 HFT market maker)
- Asymmetric order sizing based on inventory position
- Dynamic spread with adverse selection filter
- Graceful shutdown with position closing + order cancellation

Cleanup:
- Delete legacy lighter_mm.rs (-321 lines)
- Delete examples/lighter_trading.rs
- Rename Makefile targets: test-* → live-* (reflects actual live trading)

Live Trading Validation (2 min on Lighter DEX):
- 22 fills, 3.17 ETH volume (~$6,260)
- 98.4% inventory neutral (net position: 0.05 ETH)
- Average fill rate: 1 per 5.5 seconds

Net code change: +477 lines (strategy logic), -433 lines (dead code)

commit.message:
fix: memory-lint — simplify link checker, eliminate fragile regex and hardcoding

Root cause (per Linus): script was adapting to document format instead of
document adapting to script. Three-alternative lookbehind PCRE regex and
hardcoded filename enumeration were both symptoms of the same problem.

Fix: standardize navigation section to [label](path) format with memory/
prefix for L1 private files, then simplify the checker to match that contract:

  Before:
    grep -oP '(?<=\]\()[^)]+|(?<=→ \*\*)[^*]+(?=\*\*)|(?<=→ )[a-zA-Z0-9_./-]+(?=（|$| )'
    + hardcoded: decisions.md || bottlenecks.md → MEMORY_DIR
  After:
    grep -oP '(?<=\]\()[^)]+' (single pattern, obvious intent)
    + rule: memory/* → MEMORY_DIR, everything else → PROJECT_ROOT

MEMORY.md navigation section updated to match the contract:
  - All entries use [label](path) format
  - L1 files: memory/decisions.md, memory/bottlenecks.md
  - Project files: CLAUDE.md, docs/log/index.md, docs/implementation-notes.md
